sources.name: FIFA/Coca-Cola Men's World Ranking
sources.note: Last official update 2026-04-01; next official update listed by FIFA as 2026-06-11 on the ranking page.

sources.name: FIFA World Cup 2026 squads confirmed
sources.note: FIFA confirmed 48 squads and 1,248 players on 2026-06-02 after final squad submission.

sources.name: World Cup Ranking official squad list index
sources.note: Mirrors FIFA official 26-player lists for all 48 teams, published 2026-06-03.

sources.name: The Kenya Times international friendlies tracker
sources.note: Completed international friendly results through early 2026-06-05 were used for short-term form.

updateSummary.officialSquadBasis: Final 26-player squads confirmed by FIFA; existing roster tables retained and condition/form values refreshed.
updateSummary.rankingBasis: FIFA 2026-04-01 official ranking remains the latest official ranking available before the 2026-06-11 update.
